name: Papaya Tomatillo Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1 large papaya, peeled, seeded and coarsely chopped
4 medium tomatillos, husked and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the papaya, tomatillos, onions, jalapeno, lime juice, cilantro, and honey in a bowl.
2. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
Yield: about 3 cups
